allow: PowerShell($cmds = 'python','python3','py','node','npm'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\($p\){ "$c -> $p" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } })

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./seed/initial-data.json'\); console.log\('properties',d.properties.length\); console.log\('projects',d.projects.length\); console.log\('gl',d.gl.length\); console.log\('cashAdjustments',d.cashAdjustments.length\); console.log\('cash keys',Object.keys\(d.cash\)\); const wb=d.projects.filter\(p=>p.bids&&p.bids.length\); console.log\('projects with bids',wb.length\); if\(wb[0]\)console.log\('sample bid',JSON.stringify\(wb[0].bids[0]\)\); const ih=d.projects.filter\(p=>p.inHouse\); console.log\('inHouse',ih.length\); const pn=d.projects.filter\(p=>p.progressNotes&&p.progressNotes.length\); console.log\('with progressNotes',pn.length\);")
